TextView.android:text: Configure your IPTV source, media server, and guide data.
Merges your Jellyfin library into Movies and TV Shows. On duplicates, Jellyfin wins.
Add an XMLTV URL to see what\'s on now and upcoming shows.
Companion server that processes content and generates filter data automatically using AI speech recognition.
Layout, guide display, catch-up, and sports preferences.
Pick how channels and info are arranged
Show what\'s playing next to each channel
URL pattern for rewinding past programs.
Choose what to load on startup. Disabling speeds up launch time.
Preload TV show library on startup
Hide categories you don\'t want to see in Movies or Shows.
API key for online subtitle search. Get one free at opensubtitles.com
Automatically mute profanity and objectionable language during playback.
Toggle apps on/off and reorder them with the arrows.
Wallpaper, text size, language, and screen saver.
Adjust text size across the entire app
Minutes of idle before screen saver. 0 = off.
Startup, security, updates, and remote help.
Auto-open VistaCore when TV turns on
Redirect Home button to VistaCore (requires accessibility permission)
Require a 4-digit PIN to open Settings. Prevents accidental changes.
